content:
OfficerID: TM194291, Narrative
On 4-12-18 while assigned to 3C24 I responded to the address of 1 Applied Plaza to a call ofamale disturbing his ex-employers. Upon arriving I spoke with David Barrett/RP, he states he is a safety manager for Applied Industrial Technologies. Mr. Barrett had me sit down with several employees at Applied Industrial Technogies. They stated that an ex-employee/suspect (Albert Kortyna) who they fired today (4-12-18 at 0730 hours) has been calling and harassing the business all day via telephone(leaving 12 voicemails/ calling 1115-1430 hours). The employees played me the voicemails left by Mr. Kortyna. He stated he was only fired because he was white and that he blamed the African American employee(s) for getting himfired. He did not make any immediate threats but did say they should be scared. The employees have advised their security staffand are scared Mr. Kortyna may do something. The staffdid attempt to call and advise Mr. Kortyna to not call them back. Mr. Kortyna then called back 5 more times after that.
Advised Mr. Barrett and staff to prosecutor Special attn form completed WCS on file
